messages: Now let me check for the baseline and get the git SHA:
Now I have everything I need. Let me compose the acceptance contract:
Now let me validate the YAML:
All validations pass. Now let me commit:
Commit successful. Now let me call `report_outcome`:

The acceptance contract for `product-quick-view` has been compiled and committed. Here's a summary of what was produced:  **`acceptance.yml` contents:**  - **2 test fixtures**: `plp-multi-color` (`/category/mens-accessories` with multi-color swatch assertion) and `plp-add-to-bag` (`/category/womens-clothing-dresses` with in-stock assertion) - **9 required DOM elements**: `quick-view-trigger` (many), `quick-view-modal`, `quick-view-modal-error`, `quick-view-add-to-cart-btn`, `quick-view-view-full-details-link`, `quick-view-modal-close-btn`, `add-to-cart-modal`, `product-view`, `inventory-message` - **6 required flows**: open-quick-view-from-tile, switch-color-swatch-in-quick-view, add-to-bag-from-quick-view, close-quick-view-restores-focus, no-pickup-ui-in-quick-view, add-to-bag-disabled-when-unavailable - **3 forbidden network failures**: products, baskets creation, basket items endpoints - **6 base template reuse entries**: ProductView, ProductTile, useProductViewModal, useAddToCartModalContext, useCurrentBasket, useShopperBasketsMutation  URLs were resolved without locale/site prefixes per `config/default.js` (`url.locale: 'none'`, `url.site: 'none'`). All multi-instance testids (`quick-view-trigger`) use `match: first` in flow steps per Strategy A.
